# Robert Townsend - llms.txt

> Full-stack software engineer. 15+ years. Two-time Amazonian. AWS SA Pro. Stanford ML. Austin TX.

## Contact
- Email: rob@robhybrid.com

- Location: Austin, TX 78723

## Core Competencies
- AI agent orchestration and MCP server development
- Full-stack web development (React, Node.js, Python)
- AWS cloud architecture (Bedrock, Lambda, S3, CloudFront)
- Design systems and UX engineering
- CI/CD automation and DevOps
- HIPAA-compliant healthcare systems

## Key Metrics
- Reduced complex task completion time by ~60% via multi-agent orchestration
- Closed 100% of known security vulnerabilities at TotalEnergies
- Reduced manual code review overhead by ~50% with AI automation
- Raised $1M+ for nonprofits through digital fundraising apps
- Managed 20+ AI agent configurations across multiple pipelines
- 6.5 years leading HIPAA-compliant telehealth development
